title: Ubik
author: Philip K. Dick
card_summary: Widely regarded as one of Dick's masterpieces, Ubik (1969) follows Joe Chip and a team of anti-psychics whose reality begins deteriorating after a catastrophic explosion. Objects regress to earlier forms, and a mysterious product called Ubik may be the only defense against entropic decay. Houghton Mifflin Harcourt 2012 EPUB edition.
